since_last: 67% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.32% · Gold -1.57% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 67% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.14%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +8.84%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +8.84%, MU +4.43%, ARM +4.01%, VRT +2.07%, MRVL +1.98%. Laggards: EQIX -4.12%, SAP -1.69%, DLR -1.41%, PLTR -1.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.18% at $156.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
